



Greater than 4.7                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         A score higher than 4.7 out of 5 might feel untrustworthy.  Especially when you only have 5 out of 5 scores. We often, subconsciously,  think “well nobody does everything perfectly.”  

Between 4.2 - 4.7Research shows this is the most persuasive range for your review score! In this range, your score feels genuine and credible, and (potential) customers will see this as a good score for your product or service.



Less than 4.2Although this score feels credible, a score below 4.2 out of 5 stars will often be seen as not good enough. 





Critical Insight:

Social proof, and especially online review, is one of the most misused forms of persuasion. In the long run this always does harm if not done wisely and ethically.
